title: Nmann
compiled_truth: Nmann is an external contact at [Erac](companies/erac). Over the corpus period (2000-06-05 to 2001-12-28), Nmann sent 23 and received 630 emails, totalling 653 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (21), [Cbrashear](people/cbrashear-velaw) (1), [Kara Norris](people/kara-norris-hotmail) (1), [ Mikey](people/mikey) (1), [Paige](people/paige) (1).
